data.body: Let's improve the implementation review skill to be more precise.  Let's update the text to state that the review should be based solely on the code in question and the knot's description and acceptance criteria.  Specifically, the notes and the handoff_capsule should not be used to determine approval.  Lastly, rejection of the implementation requires clearly enumerated violations of the knot's description and/or acceptance criteria to be documented in the handoff capsule.
data.title: Skills: Implementation Review:  Enhance agent guidance to focus on code and specification drift
